text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of summer camp, a time for
intense training. Smart Falcon looks excited to
get started.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Let's go! Let's go, go, gooo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oops! ☆ I might've gotten a bit carried away
there! ♪
choice_data_list:
Understandable. The Japan Dirt Derby is right
around the corner.

Understandable. The Japan Dirt Derby is right
around the corner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Dirt Derby takes place around the
time summer camp begins, which means the race
is nearly upon us.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's gonna be so many super fast racers from
my generation.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That means I've gotta win so spectacularly that
everyone calls it Generation Falco! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's how good I have to be if I want everyone
cheering for me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I think I disappointed some people by running in
the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure about half of my fans would rather
see me running on dirt.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I have to win the Japan Dirt Derby and
show them that side of me again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We entered the Satsuki Sho to please her fans.
She also wants to win the Japan Dirt Derby for
the same reason. She's always thinking of her fans
first and foremost.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Once the race is over, I'm counting on you to
come up with a rigorous training plan for summer
camp!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, someone sounds dependable! I'm gonna go
hard too and make sure to win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp is off to a blazing start!
